title: Kuwshiy #3569
definition:
Cushi or Ethiopian = see Cushan "their blackness"

 1) one of the descendants of Cush the grandson of Noah through Ham
    and a member of that nation or people
 2) one of Joab's couriers
 3) (TWOT) Ethiopian
nasbUsage:
